introText: Discover the excellence of typical Italian products, carefully selected to offer an authentic and timeless taste experience.
bookingTitle: Contact us to book limited quantity products!
bookingNote: In-store pickup. NB: Mozzarella must be ordered by the Sunday of the week before!
clickForGallery: Click here for the full gallery!
storyPart1:
There is a photo that I am very attached to.
It depicts my aunt, in a farmhouse in Puglia, the land where she was born and raised, where my father also grew up with his eleven siblings.
storyPart2:
In that farmhouse, they didn't produce "to sell", they produced to live.
Bread, preserves, sweets, cheeses, wine, oil. Everything had meaning, everything had a time.
storyPart3:
That day, in the photo, my aunt was preparing a tart: a simple gesture, repeated a thousand times in her life. Floured hands, a wooden table, silence broken only by work.
No rush. No show. Only truth.
storyPart5: Terra Mia is born from these roots, from an idea of food that is not fashion, not trend, not marketing. It is memory, respect, hard work and love.
storyPart6: After years spent far from all this, I felt the need to return to my origins, to slow down, to do less, but to do it properly.
storyPart7: Terra Mia is my life choice, it is a shop where every product is chosen as if it should enter my home. Where behind every flavor there is a land, a family, a true story—like the one I come from.
storyPart8:
Here you won't find ordinary products, you will find pieces of Italy, you will find people, before you find goods.
Because for me, food is not just something to sell, it is something to honor.
storyPart9: And every time I open the door of Terra Mia, in some way, I also open that farmhouse.
